seoTitle: Telowie vs Tennyson — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Telowie and Tennyson. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Telowie and Tennyson.
heading: Telowie vs Tennyson — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Telowie, South Australia and Tennyson, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tennyson has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Telowie (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Telowie or Tennyson safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Telowie has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Tennyson scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Telowie scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Tennyson scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Telowie or Tennyson?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tennyson has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
